name: Mistral AI
description: Registers Mistral AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Mistral API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Mistral API key
settings.description: Mistral API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to MISTRAL_API_KEY.

providers.name: Mistral AI
providers.description: Refreshes Mistral chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
